<> Here is the PHP code to replace the old URL with the new one in your string while handling multiple occurrences $oldUrl = 'http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1' $newUrl = 'http://yahoo.com/abc1' $subject = 'New post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

New post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

' $result = str_replace($oldUrl, $newUrl, $subject) echo $result This approach works for any number of repeating instances within the text A palindrome for you to enjoy is noon
